title: DCPU Kancheepuram Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for 03 Counselor Posts
description: District Child Protection Unit Kancheepuram (DCPU Kancheepuram) has officially released the notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for 03 Counselor Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in Post Graduation, M.Sc, can grab this chance nd apply for the DCPU Kancheepuram Recruitment 2026 . Here, we mentioned the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts.
